name: Gamma
notes:
Gamma establish BGP sessions with eyeball peers and CDN peers across different ports at an IXP where dual connectivity is provisioned.

Gamma no longer peer with route servers at any exchange point however do operate an OPEN peering policy. If you would like to peer with Gamma please send an email to peering@.
Please ensure peeringDB records are accurate as this is used to help produce configuration and out of date information may result in issues with your session.
